overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a journey from a gritty residential neighborhood through palm-lined avenues into a dense, neon-lit downtown district. The scene transitions from on-foot exploration to vehicle driving, passing through a tunnel and emerging into a futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and flying vehicles at dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: gritty residential neighborhood with graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow streets observing graffiti and billboards in the residential district

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement board mounted on a pole above the buildings
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
two-story weathered building with small windows and corrugated metal roof
crisscrossing electrical wires connecting utility poles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a gritty cyberpunk residential neighborhood at dusk. The camera moves past graffiti-covered walls and low-rise buildings while overhead power lines crisscross against the darkening sky. A large rectangular billboard is visible in the distance.

events.description: transition from walking to driving along the avenue
flying vehicle passes overhead from left to right

agents.ego_description: driving along the palm-lined avenue toward the city skyline, observing an aerial vehicle passing overhead

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle hovering and moving across the sky above the avenue

entered.detail: large cylindrical digital display structure with rotating advertisements
futuristic city skyline with illuminated high-rise towers and holographic displays
tall palm trees lining both sides of the avenue

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide palm-lined avenue with the futuristic city skyline visible in the distance. The camera is now driving along the road, passing tall palm trees on both sides. A flying vehicle passes overhead, and a large circular digital billboard structure becomes visible on the left.

events.description: approaching the tunnel entrance as the avenue narrows

agents.ego_description: speeding along the palm-lined road toward the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: dark entrance to an underground tunnel with red lighting accents
tall street lamp illuminating the road

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the avenue, the camera approaches a tunnel entrance ahead. The palm trees continue to line the road while the city skyline shifts to the right. Street lights become more prominent as the vehicle nears the dark tunnel portal.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban tunnel with maglev rail tracks

events.description: entering tunnel, switching from natural dusk to artificial lighting
exiting tunnel back to natural dusk lighting

agents.ego_description: driving through the tunnel following the vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: car ahead with brake lights on, navigating the tunnel

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with ventilation grates and lighting fixtures
smooth concrete walls with safety markings
futuristic rail tracks embedded in the road surface
overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow enclosed tunnel with artificial lighting. Concrete walls and ceiling surround the road, with maglev rail tracks visible in the center. The camera follows a car ahead through the dimly lit passage before approaching the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk downtown intersection with elevated highways

events.description: exiting tunnel into dense downtown with towering skyscrapers
stopping at red traffic light at intersection
proceeding through intersection on green light

agents.ego_description: navigating through busy downtown intersections, stopping at traffic signals and proceeding through the neon-lit streets

notable_agents.action: car ahead stopping at the red traffic light
white sedan passing through the intersection from the left

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass and highway ramp structure overhead
towering futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows and red accent lights
overhead traffic light structure with street name signs for Crestmont and Valencia
large digital advertisement display showing animated content
bright red neon signs and building illumination

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a dense cyberpunk downtown with massive elevated highways and towering mega-skyscrapers. The camera navigates through intersections with traffic signal gantries displaying street names, stopping at red lights and proceeding on green. Holographic billboards and red neon signage illuminate the hazy dusk atmosphere while flying vehicles pass overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a gritty residential neighborhood into the heart of a dense, neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis at dusk. It begins by moving past graffiti-covered walls and low-rise buildings under a web of power lines before transitioning onto a wide, palm-lined avenue where the distant city skyline first emerges. As the camera drives forward, passing flying vehicles and circular digital billboards, the open road narrows and the lighting shifts toward the artificial glow of a dark tunnel portal. The scene then plunges into a narrow enclosed passage with concrete walls and central maglev tracks, following a car through the dim light toward the exit. Finally, the camera bursts from the tunnel into a sprawling downtown district characterized by towering mega-skyscrapers, elevated highways, and holographic billboards that illuminate the hazy atmosphere.
